Author: Tiberius
Name: Glamour This
Punchline: A fast, filterable replacement for the Glamour Dresser and Armoire.
Description:
Glamour This puts a searchable, sortable overlay over your Glamour Dresser. Find armor and outfit sets instantly, spot duplicates at a glance, filter by location, slot or expansion, group pieces into their outfit glamour sets, and pull pieces out of the dresser into your bags while standing at a dresser.

Main command: /glamthis (alias /gt).
